top_signals.title: JPMorgan’s Foley Sees Strong IPO Growth in HK, China
top_signals.summary: Kevin Foley, Co-Head of Global Investment Banking at JPMorgan, says deal-making activity remains strong globally despite the higher rates environment and inflationary pressures. He expects IPO activity to grow significantly in Hong Kong and mainland China, particularly in the AI and healthcare sectors. He spoke exclusively with Bloomberg's Haslinda Amin on the sidelines of the JPMorgan Global China Summit. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Anthropic on track for first profitable quarter
top_signals.summary: AI lab set to hit milestone ahead of competitors OpenAI and xAI
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
